meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Debugging: Antigravity Template for AI Developers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with cryptic bugs. Learn to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to debug complex applications like a senior engineer.
content.answer_block: Debugging failures stem from lack of observability. By implementing the Antigravity project template, you gain structured error handling and deterministic state tracking. When paired with Claude Code, you can automate root-cause analysis, transforming opaque stack traces into actionable refactoring tasks that accelerate your development velocity and production stability.
content.intro:
The screen flickers. You’ve been staring at a silent terminal for three hours, chasing a ghost in the machine that refuses to resolve. Every console log feels like shouting into a void, and your once-promising project has become a labyrinth of technical debt. It is the rite of passage every developer fears: the moment where your logic fails and the debugger provides no answers.

But the best engineers don't just 'fix' bugs—they architect systems that make bugs impossible to hide. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you shift from reactive patching to proactive, systematic engineering. This guide will show you how to leverage advanced CLI tools and structured project scaffolding to reclaim control over your codebase and build with the precision of a senior architect.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation using the Antigravity template to ensure consistent directory structures and error boundaries.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard scaffolding, including strict TypeScript, modular error handling, and integrated logging middleware.

steps.title: Inject Observability Hooks
steps.description: Add diagnostic middleware to capture state snapshots before and after execution, making silent failures visible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject diagnostic hooks into the main controller layer to log payload state and execution context for every public method.

steps.title: Automate Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to analyze your stack traces against the Antigravity error patterns to identify the source of the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the latest crash logs in /logs/error.log and identify if the failure originates from state mutation or external API latency.

steps.title: Refactor with Deterministic Patterns
steps.description: Apply functional programming paradigms provided by the template to isolate side effects and simplify debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified problematic module into a pure function using the Antigravity functional state pattern to eliminate race conditions.

steps.title: Verify with Automated Regression
steps.description: Implement a test suite that mocks the specific error condition found, ensuring the bug never returns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test suite based on the failure scenario identified in step 3 to ensure regression coverage.

pro_tips: Always wrap your entry points in an Antigravity 'ErrorBoundary' to prevent silent app crashes.
Use 'claude code --diff' to review exactly how the AI modifies your logic before applying changes to production code.
Treat your logs as a database; query them with structured tools rather than reading them line-by-line.
Implement 'Feature Flags' within your Antigravity config to toggle problematic modules off without rolling back your entire deployment.
Never debug in production; use the Antigravity 'Shadow-Mode' to mirror production traffic into a staging environment for deep analysis.
content.next_steps: Now that you have debugged your first module, deploy this project to a cloud provider and monitor the telemetry in real-time to observe your new error-handling architecture in action.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to stop chasing bugs and start building scalable, resilient software. Don't let technical hurdles stand between you and your career goals. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
